rationale: Review 2's single finding matches the exact `by simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` closure in fiberHomeomorph (Deck.lean:73) and correctly identifies its non-explicit reliance on the ambient simp set for a non-trivial fiber predicate; acting on it produces an explicitly stable proof that a maintainer would accept. Review 1's approve leaves this unnecessary brittleness untouched, so the revised PR from following Review 2 is strictly better.
